Eligibility.req_2: At least 2 blank pages in your passport for immigration stamps
Eligibility.req_3: A high-quality digital portrait photo (white background, color)
Eligibility.req_4: Scan or clear photo of your passport biodata page

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions about Vietnam E-Visa.
FAQ.q1: How long does it take to get a Vietnam e-visa?
FAQ.a1: Standard processing takes 7 working days. Urgent options are available from 4 hours to 1 working day depending on visa type.
FAQ.q2: What documents do I need to apply?
FAQ.a2: You need a valid passport (6+ months validity), a passport bio-page scan, and a portrait photo. VIP fast-track may require additional documents.
FAQ.q3: Can I apply for multiple applicants in one order?
FAQ.a3: Yes. Select the number of applicants in Step 1 and complete a separate form card for each person in Step 2.
FAQ.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
FAQ.a4: We accept major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard) and PayPal. All charges are in USD.
FAQ.q5: What if my application is rejected?
FAQ.a5: Our money-back guarantee covers eligible rejections. Contact support with your booking number for assistance.

reviews.2_text: Clear pricing, no hidden fees. Support answered my questions within minutes on WhatsApp.
reviews.3_text: The form was straightforward and the status checker kept me updated. Highly recommend.

0.title: Cruising the mystical emerald waters of Ha Long Bay
0.excerpt: Discover the thousands of limestone karsts rising dramatically from the quiet sea, and explore hidden caves on standard wooden junk boats.

1.title: A food lover's 48-hour guide to exploring Hanoi's Old Quarter
1.excerpt: Savor steaming bowls of Pho, delicious crunchy Banh Mi, and egg coffee on the narrow railway streets of Vietnam's thousand-year-old capital.

2.title: Have you experienced all the vibrant colors of travel in Da Nang?
2.excerpt: Da Nang - the most modern and remarkable city situated on the banks of the Han River - greets visitors with beautiful beaches and the legendary Golden Bridge.

3.title: Must-see places in Ho Chi Minh City (Saigon)
3.excerpt: Whether living here or as a tourist, this beautiful city will still attract you by its unique combination of historic French architecture and dynamic nightlife.

4.title: The most fascinating mountain passes in Northern Vietnam for adventure lovers
4.excerpt: Downing a pass at midnight, or building a camp on the way are the valuable memories for the lovers of adventures conquering Ha Giang & Cao Bang.

0.question: How long does it take to get a Vietnam e-visa?
0.answer: Standard processing takes 7 working days. Urgent options are available from 4 hours to 1 working day depending on visa type.

1.question: What documents do I need to apply?
1.answer: You need a valid passport (6+ months validity), a passport bio-page scan, and a portrait photo. VIP fast-track may require additional documents.

2.question: Can I apply for multiple applicants in one order?
2.answer: Yes. Select the number of applicants in Step 1 and complete a separate form card for each person in Step 2.

3.question: What payment methods do you accept?
3.answer: We accept major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard) and PayPal. All charges are in USD.

4.question: What if my application is rejected?
4.answer: Our money-back guarantee covers eligible rejections. Contact support with your booking number for assistance.

requirements.0: Ordinary US Passport valid for 6 months beyond arrival date
requirements.1: At least 2 blank pages in the passport for entry stamps
requirements.2: 1 recent portrait photograph (color, white background, no glasses)
requirements.3: High-resolution digital scan/photo of the passport biodata page

us.note: US citizens can easily apply online for tourist or business E-Visa. Ensure that your designated port of entry exactly matches your E-Visa approval letter.

requirements.0: Australian Passport valid for at least 6 months
requirements.1: At least 2 blank pages in the passport for entry stamps
requirements.2: Recent passport-sized photo (white background, clear face)
requirements.3: Clear photo of passport details page (biodata page)

au.note: Australian passport holders are 100% eligible. High-speed entry Fast-Track airport service is highly recommended at Hanoi (HAN) and Saigon (SGN) to skip long immigration queues.

requirements.0: Ordinary Chinese Passport (G-series). E-passports (E-series) are supported for flights but require careful border validation checks
requirements.1: Passport must have 6 months validity and 2 blank pages
requirements.2: Clear passport-sized photo with white background
requirements.3: Scanned copy of the passport biodata page

cn.note: E-visa applies only to ordinary G-series passports. E-passports (starting with E) may experience extra checks at certain land borders. Flight travel is fully recommended.

requirements.0: Canadian Passport valid for 6 months beyond stay duration
requirements.1: At least 2 blank pages in passport for entry/exit stamps
requirements.2: Digital portrait photograph in JPG format
requirements.3: Digital scan of passport identification page

ca.note: Canadian citizens can travel to Vietnam for tourism, business, or family visits. The online application is simple and requires no embassy visits.

gb.status: Visa Exempt (45 Days) & E-Visa Eligible (90 Days)
gb.stay: Visa-Free: 45 Days | E-Visa: Up to 90 Days

requirements.0: Valid UK Passport with 6 months validity and 2 blank pages
requirements.1: For Exemption: Proof of onward/return ticket within 45 days
requirements.2: For E-Visa: Passport scan and digital portrait photo

gb.note: British citizens enjoy 45 days visa-free entry. If you plan to stay longer (up to 90 days) or require multiple entries, apply for an E-Visa online before departure.

fr.status: Visa Exempt (45 Days) & E-Visa Eligible (90 Days)
fr.stay: Visa-Free: 45 Days | E-Visa: Up to 90 Days

requirements.0: Valid French Passport with 6 months validity
requirements.1: For Exemption: Onward flight ticket within 45 days
requirements.2: For E-Visa: Passport scan and portrait photo

fr.note: French citizens are exempt for up to 45 days. Stays from 46 to 90 days require an E-Visa.

de.stay: Visa-Free: 45 Days | E-Visa: Up to 90 Days

requirements.0: Valid German Passport with 6 months validity
requirements.1: For Exemption: Onward flight ticket within 45 days
requirements.2: For E-Visa: Passport scan and portrait photo

de.note: German citizens enjoy 45 days visa-free entry. Stays from 46 to 90 days require an E-Visa.

jp.status: Visa Exempt (45 Days) & E-Visa Eligible (90 Days)
jp.stay: Visa-Free: 45 Days | E-Visa: Up to 90 Days

requirements.0: Valid Japanese Passport with minimum 6 months validity
requirements.1: For Exemption: Return or onward ticket within 45 days
requirements.2: For E-Visa: Digital passport scan and portrait photograph

jp.note: Japanese passport holders enjoy one of the strongest visa exemptions. For stays beyond 45 days or multiple entries, apply for an E-Visa online before departure.

kr.status: Visa Exempt (45 Days) & E-Visa Eligible (90 Days)
kr.stay: Visa-Free: 45 Days | E-Visa: Up to 90 Days

requirements.0: Valid South Korean Passport with 6 months validity
requirements.1: Proof of return or onward travel ticket within 45 days (exemption)
requirements.2: For E-Visa: Passport biodata scan and recent portrait photo

kr.note: South Korean citizens benefit from 45 days visa-free access. Frequent visitors and long-term travelers should apply for a 90-day Multiple Entry E-Visa.

requirements.0: Valid Indian Passport with at least 6 months validity
requirements.1: At least 2 blank pages in the passport
requirements.3: Clear scan of passport biodata page

in.note: Indian citizens must obtain an E-Visa before arrival. The application process is fully online and typically takes 3-5 working days. Apply well in advance for busy travel seasons.

sg.status: Visa Exempt (30 Days) & E-Visa Eligible (90 Days)
sg.stay: Visa-Free: 30 Days | E-Visa: Up to 90 Days

requirements.0: Valid Singapore Passport with 6 months validity
requirements.1: For Exemption: Onward flight ticket within 30 days
requirements.2: For E-Visa: Digital passport scan and portrait photo

sg.note: Singapore passport holders enjoy 30 days visa-free entry — one of the highest bilateral trust levels. For extended stays or business trips, apply for the 90-day E-Visa.

es.status: Visa Exempt (45 Days) & E-Visa Eligible (90 Days)
es.stay: Visa-Free: 45 Days | E-Visa: Up to 90 Days

requirements.0: Valid Spanish Passport with minimum 6 months validity
requirements.1: For Exemption: Proof of onward/return journey within 45 days
requirements.2: For E-Visa: Passport scan and recent color portrait photo

es.note: Spanish citizens enjoy 45 days visa-free access to Vietnam. Planning a longer Indochina trip? Apply for the 90-day multiple entry E-Visa for full flexibility.

it.status: Visa Exempt (45 Days) & E-Visa Eligible (90 Days)
it.stay: Visa-Free: 45 Days | E-Visa: Up to 90 Days

requirements.0: Valid Italian Passport with at least 6 months validity
requirements.1: For Exemption: Confirmed onward/return ticket within 45 days
requirements.2: For E-Visa: Digital passport scan and portrait photograph

it.note: Italian passport holders are visa-exempt for 45 days. For longer trips combining Vietnam with Cambodia or Laos, the 90-day multiple-entry E-Visa is the best option.

nl.status: Visa Exempt (45 Days) & E-Visa Eligible (90 Days)
nl.stay: Visa-Free: 45 Days | E-Visa: Up to 90 Days

requirements.0: Valid Dutch/Netherlands Passport with 6 months validity
requirements.1: Proof of return or onward flight (for exemption)
requirements.2: For E-Visa: Passport scan and portrait photo

nl.note: Dutch citizens benefit from 45 days visa-free entry. For business meetings or extended vacations, the Vietnam E-Visa can be obtained online within 3 working days.

my.status: Visa Exempt (30 Days) & E-Visa Eligible (90 Days)
my.stay: Visa-Free: 30 Days | E-Visa: Up to 90 Days

requirements.0: Valid Malaysian Passport with 6 months validity
requirements.1: Confirmed return or onward ticket within 30 days (exemption)
requirements.2: For E-Visa: Clear passport scan and digital portrait photo

my.note: Malaysian passport holders are eligible for 30 days visa-free entry. Frequent cross-border travelers and business visitors should apply for the 90-day multiple-entry E-Visa.

c1.content: Is the 24-hour urgent service available on weekends? I have a sudden flight scheduled for Monday morning and need the E-Visa processed as soon as possible.

r1.content: Hi Marcus! Yes, our urgent and super-urgent E-Visa services operate 24/7, including weekends and public holidays. Since your flight is on Monday morning, we highly recommend selecting the 'Super Urgent 4 hours' or 'Urgent 24 hours' processing speed. Please ensure your passport photo and scan are clear to avoid any delays.

c2.content: I'm arriving at Hanoi (HAN) and departing from Da Nang (DAD). Do I need a multiple-entry visa for this?

r2.content: Hello Sarah! Since you're arriving at Hanoi (HAN) and departing from Da Nang (DAD), you only need a single-entry e-visa as you will remain inside Vietnam during your travel between the two cities.

c3.content: Konnichiwa! I am a Japanese citizen planning to stay in Vietnam for 60 days. Do I need an e-visa or does the exemption cover me?

r3.content: Konnichiwa Hiroshi! Yes, Japanese citizens enjoy a 45-day visa exemption when entering Vietnam. Since you wish to stay for 60 days, you must apply for a tourist E-Visa. We recommend applying for our '90-day single entry' or '90-day multiple entry' E-Visa online, which will easily cover your 60-day stay.

tips.question: What is a Vietnam E-visa?
tips.answer: An electronic visa issued by the Vietnamese government. You receive a PDF approval letter to present at immigration.

tips.question: How fast can I get my visa?
tips.answer: Normal processing is 7 working days. Urgent options: 4 days, 2 days, 1 day, or 4 working hours depending on visa type.

tips.question: Are there additional costs?
tips.answer: Total = base service fee + processing surcharge + optional extras (e.g. VIP fast-track +$55). Stamping fee at airport is separate ($25 tourist / $50 business).

Faqs.question: How long does it take to get a Vietnam e-visa?
Faqs.answer: Standard processing takes 7 working days. Urgent options are available from 4 hours to 1 working day depending on visa type.

Faqs.question: Which nationalities are eligible for Vietnam e-visa?
Faqs.answer: Most nationalities including US, UK, Australia, Canada, EU countries, India, and Japan. Use our eligibility checker on the homepage.

Faqs.question: Is FastVisa an official government website?
Faqs.answer: We are a licensed visa service provider. We submit applications on your behalf and deliver approved e-visas via email.

Faqs.question: Do I need a visa to visit Phu Quoc Island?
Faqs.answer: Foreign travelers are exempt from Vietnam visa requirements for stays up to 30 days on Phu Quoc Island, provided they enter via Phu Quoc International Airport or seaport and do not leave the island. If you plan to travel to other parts of Vietnam, you must apply for an E-visa.

Faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
Faqs.answer: We accept major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard) and PayPal. All charges are in USD.

Faqs.question: Are there hidden fees?
Faqs.answer: No. Your checkout total equals base service fee + processing surcharge + any optional extras you selected.

Faqs.question: Can I get a refund if my application is rejected?
Faqs.answer: Our money-back guarantee covers eligible rejections. Contact support with your booking number for assistance.

Faqs.question: What documents do I need to apply?
Faqs.answer: Valid passport (6+ months), passport bio-page scan, and portrait photo. VIP fast-track may require additional documents.

Faqs.question: Can I apply for multiple applicants in one order?
Faqs.answer: Yes. Select the number of applicants in Step 1 and complete a separate form for each person in Step 2.

Faqs.question: Can I save my application and finish later?
Faqs.answer: Yes. Your draft is saved locally in your browser so you can return and complete it within 7 days.

Faqs.question: How do I check my application status?
Faqs.answer: Use the Check Status page with your booking number and registration email to see real-time updates.

Faqs.question: When can I download my approved visa?
Faqs.answer: Once status shows Completed, a Download Visa button appears with your PDF approval letter.

Faqs.question: What if I need to change my travel dates?
Faqs.answer: Contact support with your booking number before your visa is processed. Changes may not be possible after submission to immigration.

Faqs.question: Can I change my port of entry after E-Visa approval?
Faqs.answer: No, you cannot change your port of entry once your Vietnam E-visa has been issued. If you must enter through a different port than the one printed on your approved E-visa, you will need to apply for a new E-visa. Travel departments and airlines will deny boarding if the entry port does not match.

fastTrack.title: Vietnam Airport – Fast Track Service
fastTrack.desc: Skip the long queues at immigration. Our staff will assist you through a private track, saving you valuable time upon arrival.
fastTrack.normalDesc: It takes you only 15 to 20 minutes instead of 1 hour waiting as normal. Our staff holds a board with your name at the Immigration area, takes your passport and stamping fee to do all procedures, and returns your stamped passport while you wait for identification processing.
fastTrack.vipDesc: It takes you only 5 to 10 minutes. Our staff waits with your name board, takes your passport and fee. You don't need to wait for identification processing—go straight through a private VIP track to baggage claim or your car!

carPickup.title: Private Car Pickup Airport
carPickup.desc: We pick you up from the airport and bring you safely to your specific address by our modern, well-maintained cars with professional drivers.

hotel.title: Hotel Reservation
hotel.desc: Besides Vietnam visa services, we also offer Hotel Reservation services with the best prices. Log into your account registered during your visa application to browse the room lists.
hotel.step1: After applying for a visa on our website, leave a message with your preferred hotel's name or price range.
hotel.step2: Alternatively, email us your requirements to sales@vietnamevisa.com.

noTravel.title: No Travel Required

guaranteed.desc: 10+ years experience dealing with Immigration Department.

fast.title: Fast Processing
fast.desc: Urgent services available for tight deadlines.

q1.q: How long does it take to extend a visa?
q1.a: The standard processing time is 5-7 working days. However, we also offer urgent processing options if your visa is about to expire.

q2.a: No, currently the Vietnam Immigration Department does not allow extensions for E-Visas. You must exit the country and apply for a new visa.

q3.a: Overstaying your visa will result in administrative fines starting from 500,000 VND to 20,000,000 VND depending on the number of days overstayed, and possible deportation or blacklisting.

definitions.title: Important Definitions
definitions.visaPeriodDesc: The valid period of a visa is clearly shown by effective date and expiry date on the applicants' visas.
definitions.tempStayDesc: Maximum period (Number of days) that foreigners are allowed to stay since entry. The temporary stay period can be shorter or equal to the period of the visa but never longer than valid period of the visa.
definitions.whatIsDesc: Foreigners who have been granted a visa and are staying in Vietnam and wish to continue their stay after the visa expires, need to carry out visa extension (also known as temporary residence extensions). This allows foreigners to continue to stay in Vietnam without having to leave.

visaTypes.title: Allowed Visa Types for Extension
visaTypes.evisaDesc: This type of visa CANNOT be extended. Foreigners who use e-visas to enter Vietnam need to exit on time upon expiration, then apply for a new visa if they want to continue to enter.
visaTypes.voaDesc: This type of visa is allowed to be extended. The extension time depends on the purpose of stay and relevant regulations in Law on exit and entry of Vietnam.

procedures.title: Procedures for Visa Extension
procedures.desc: Follow these steps to extend your stay in Vietnam smoothly and legally.
procedures.step1Desc: Gather original passport, NA5 form, and sponsoring company/relative documents.
procedures.step2Desc: Submit to Vietnam Immigration Department in Hanoi, Da Nang, or Ho Chi Minh City.
procedures.step3Desc: Processing time is 5-7 working days. Receive passport with new extension stamp.

trc.title: Temporary Residence Card
trc.desc: Can enter and stay up to the length of the temporary residence card.

vec.title: Visa Exemption Certificate
vec.desc: Can enter and stay up to 180 days.

apec.title: APEC Cards
apec.desc: Valid passport holders with APEC cards can enter and stay up to 60 days.

sez.title: Special Economic Zones
sez.desc: E.g., Phu Quoc Island. Can enter and stay up to 30 days.

bilateral.title: Bilateral Visa Exemption
bilateral.desc: Must exit Vietnam after the stay expires, then re-enter if a longer stay is needed.

unilateral.title: Unilateral Visa Exemption
unilateral.desc: After the allowed stay expires, it is possible to extend for an additional 15 days.

vec.title: Visa Exemption Certificate
vec.desc: Can extend for another 180 days with a valid guarantor in Vietnam and a justified reason.

extension.note: Note: All temporary residence extensions are processed at the Immigration Department of Vietnam.

fast.title: Fast Processing
fast.desc: Get your results quickly within 3-5 working days. We support the entire process from preparation to completion.

accuracy.title: 100% Accuracy
accuracy.desc: Our experts prepare documents quickly and ensure 100% accuracy for a successful extension.

convenience.title: Convenience
convenience.desc: No need to visit authorities. We collect documents and deliver results directly to your address in Vietnam.

extension.title: Extension of Visa Exemption
extension.needExtensionDesc: Extend your stay in Vietnam legally and safely with our professional services.
extension.whyUs: Why Use Our Visa Extension Services?

whatIs.title: What is Visa Exemption?
whatIs.desc: Visa exemption (also known as visa-free) allows citizens of specific countries to enter Vietnam without applying for a visa or paying any visa-related fees, for a designated period of time.
whatIs.bilateralDesc: An agreement between two countries allowing citizens of both to travel visa-free to each other's territories.
whatIs.unilateralDesc: Vietnam unilaterally exempts citizens of a specific country from visas, regardless of whether that country offers visa-free entry to Vietnamese citizens.
whatIs.note: Note: This visa exemption is completely different from the VISA EXEMPTION CERTIFICATE (5-YEAR VISA) issued to overseas Vietnamese or those who are Spouses/Children of Overseas Vietnamese.

requirements.title: Requirements for Visa Free Entry
requirements.desc: Ensure your travel documents meet the standard criteria before departure.
requirements.nationalityDesc: Hold a passport from a country on the bilateral/unilateral visa exemption list.
requirements.validityDesc: Passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of arrival.
requirements.blankPagesDesc: Passport must have at least two (02) blank pages for immigration stamps.

list.title: Exempted Countries
list.desc: Vietnam currently grants bilateral and unilateral visa exemptions to citizens from 25 countries.
list.note1: From January 1, 2023, citizens of countries on the unilateral visa exemption list can enter and exit an unlimited number of times without waiting 30 days between entries.
list.note2: British nationals overseas (BNOs) are not exempt from Vietnam visa.
list.note3: Citizens of these countries can still apply for a visa if they wish to stay longer.

options.title: How To Make Payment?
options.desc: There are 2 convenient options to make payment for your visa application. Choose the one that works best for you.

paypal.title: Pay via PayPal
paypal.desc1: Pay through PayPal (www.paypal.com) using your credit card.
paypal.desc2: On the last step of the application process, we will provide a payment link via the PayPal gate, or the link will be sent to your email. Click that payment link to make a payment using our PayPal Address:
paypal.quote: "The www.paypal.com is one among the most reliable International Money-Transfer Networks. It is used to send and receive money by customers worldwide. Safer, Easier, Quicker, and no refunded online money sending is what customers find at PayPal." – Paypal

cash.title: Pay in Cash
cash.desc1: Pay in cash at our office in Vietnam.
cash.desc2: If you have friends or relatives in Vietnam, you can ask them to visit our office to make the payment for your application.
cash.officeDesc2: No 47/2 Hoang Sam, Nghia Do Ward, Cau Giay Dist, Hanoi City, Vietnam

notes.title: Special Notes
notes.imgDesc: Important information regarding your visa application processing.
notes.processDesc: Once we receive your payment, we will process your visa approval letter. It will be ready on our website after 1 business day (urgent service) or 2 business days (normal service).
notes.feeDesc: The fee you pay us is the service fee used to process your visa approval letter. When picking up the visa stamp at the arrival airport, you are required to pay an additional stamping fee.

help.title: Need Help?
help.desc: Our support department is ready to assist you. We will respond within 2 hours during business hours and within 24 hours out of office hours.

PaymentGuideline.heroSubtitle: We offer secure and convenient payment options for your visa application. Remember that the fee you pay us is the service fee to process your visa approval letter.

CheckStatusPage.title: Check Application Status
CheckStatusPage.subtitle: Track your visa application in real time

faqs.question: How long does it take for status to update?
faqs.answer: Status updates occur within 1 business day after each processing milestone. Urgent orders may update faster.

faqs.question: What does 'Processing' status mean?
faqs.answer: Your application has been received and is being reviewed by our team. You'll receive an email when it progresses.

faqs.question: When can I download my approved e-visa?
faqs.answer: Once your status shows 'Completed', a Download button will appear on this page. Check your email for the direct link.

faqs.question: What if my status shows 'On Hold'?
faqs.answer: Our team may need additional information. Check your email inbox (including spam) or contact WhatsApp support immediately.

faqs.question: I can't find my booking number — what should I do?
faqs.answer: Your booking number (starting with FV-) was sent to your registration email at the time of payment. Search for 'FastVisa booking' in your inbox.

faqs.question: My visa was approved but I haven't received the PDF.
faqs.answer: Check your spam/junk folder for emails from thanhdatvietnamvisa@gmail.com. If not found, use the Download button on this page or contact our WhatsApp support.

CheckStatusForm.lookup_desc: Enter your booking number and registration email to view application status.
CheckStatusForm.network_error: Could not connect to the server. Please check your connection and try again.
CheckStatusForm.not_found: No application found. Verify your booking number and email match your registration.

EntryGateModal.title: Have you already applied for your E-Visa?
EntryGateModal.desc: This helps us direct you to the right service so we can assist you faster.
EntryGateModal.opt_new_title: No, I need a new E-Visa
EntryGateModal.opt_new_desc: Start a new e-visa application — Standard or Urgent processing.
EntryGateModal.opt_fasttrack_title: Yes, I have E-Visa & need Fast-Track
EntryGateModal.opt_fasttrack_desc: Already have E-Visa? Book official Airport Fast-Track assistance here.
EntryGateModal.opt_urgent_title: Yes, I applied but need urgent help
EntryGateModal.opt_urgent_desc: Already submitted? Contact us immediately for expedited processing support.

why_us_items.title: 100% Refund Policy
why_us_items.desc: Full money-back if visa is rejected.

why_us_items.title: Expert Pre-Screening
why_us_items.desc: We check every photo & document manually.

SubPageSidebar.urgent_desc: Flight departing soon? Application stuck? Get instant help from our 24/7 dedicated support team on WhatsApp.

Step1.processing_urgent_2d_expectedTime: Results returned at 5:30 PM after 2 working days, after application receipt
Step1.processing_urgent_1d_expectedTime: Results returned at 5:30 PM after 1 working day, after application receipt

Step1.processing_urgent_2h_note: Manual eligibility check required before confirming
Step1.processing_urgent_2h_expectedTime: Results returned 2 hours after application receipt
Step1.processing_urgent_1h_note: Manual eligibility check required before confirming

Step1.processing_last_minute_caption: Outside business hours or public holidays

Step2.vip_fasttrack_desc: Skip the immigration queue entirely. Our dedicated agent meets you at the gate and fast-tracks you.

EmergencyInquiryPage.pricing_unavailable: Emergency pricing is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or contact support.
EmergencyInquiryPage.title: Emergency Inquiry
EmergencyInquiryPage.subtitle: Traveling soon? Our urgent support team responds within 2 hours
EmergencyInquiryPage.alert_desc_prefix: Use this dashboard only for time-sensitive issues where your departure is within 72 hours. For general inquiries, please visit our
EmergencyInquiryPage.pricing_desc: Choose the speed that matches your departure timeframe. Prices are inclusive of all service fees.
EmergencyInquiryPage.tier_last_minute_desc: For passengers stuck at departure gates or boarding immediately.
EmergencyInquiryPage.tier_last_minute_best: Stranded at airport / Flight boarding in <3 hours
EmergencyInquiryPage.tier_2h_desc: Ultra-fast government clearance for same-day flights.
EmergencyInquiryPage.tier_2h_best: Departure today / Flight in under 12 hours
EmergencyInquiryPage.tier_4h_desc: Rapid review and processing for next-flight travelers.
EmergencyInquiryPage.tier_4h_best: Flight tonight or early tomorrow morning
EmergencyInquiryPage.tier_2d_desc: Fast-tracked application, perfect for last-minute business plans.
EmergencyInquiryPage.timeline_desc: How we fast-track your application to bypass typical government processing delays.
EmergencyInquiryPage.step1_desc: Gather passport bio-page copy, a portrait photo, arrival port, and flight departure time, then submit our emergency form.
EmergencyInquiryPage.step2_desc: For extreme urgency (2h/4h), reach out directly via WhatsApp (+84-93-6699-869) to verify and unlock priority clearance.
EmergencyInquiryPage.step3_desc: Our dedicated support team works directly with immigration. The approved E-Visa is delivered straight to your email inbox.
EmergencyInquiryPage.form_success_desc1: Our emergency team will contact you within 2 hours. Keep your phone available.
EmergencyInquiryPage.form_badge_desc: All fields are required for priority handling
EmergencyInquiryPage.form_error: Could not submit your urgent inquiry. Please try again or call support.
EmergencyInquiryPage.form_message_placeholder: Explain your situation clearly — include flight details, departure time, and any relevant context...
EmergencyInquiryPage.correction_subtitle: Stranded at departure gate / Denied boarding?
EmergencyInquiryPage.correction_desc1: Airlines and border control will **strictly deny boarding or entry** if your approved E-Visa has even a single character mismatch with your passport bio-page, or if you attempt to arrive at a different port of entry.
EmergencyInquiryPage.err_1: Typo in Full Name (spelling order, middle name missing)
EmergencyInquiryPage.err_2: Incorrect Passport Number or Expiry Date
EmergencyInquiryPage.err_3: Mismatched Entry Port (changing from Hanoi to Ho Chi Minh City, etc.)
EmergencyInquiryPage.err_4: Wrong Date of Birth or Mismatched Nationality
EmergencyInquiryPage.correction_desc2: If you are stuck at the boarding gate, do not panic. We provide a **24/7 Priority Visa Re-issuance & Correction service** directly linked with Vietnam Immigration. We can reissue a corrected approval document in **1 to 2 hours**.

ContactUs.success_desc: Our team will reply within 24 hours. Check your inbox for a confirmation email.
ContactUs.error_generic: Could not send your message. Please try again later.
